questions.memo: for files, programs and data / Separate working files and applications / Increase life span of the SSD and HDD drives

questions.question: Differentiate between system software and application software.
questions.memo: Manage hardware and system operations / Runs in the background / Include operating system and utility programs / Essential for computer function to run

questions.memo: A site licence agreement allows an institution unlimited installation within the company
